subcodes.first_line: O thou whose senses are perfumed with the sweet fragrance of the garment of the eternal Joseph! Praise God that in these days, beneath the shelter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشامت معطر از رائحه طیبه قمیص یوسف بقا حمد کن خدا را که در این ایام در ظل
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
